rationale: For a factory-floor mobile web app, we need extreme clarity, tactile functional surfaces, and high-contrast status indicators. The UI avoids soft consumer-app fluff (heavy shadows, large radii) in favor of crisp borders, dense data typography, and stark 'control room' contrast that reads perfectly under harsh factory lighting.

hierarchy.mono_label: font-mono text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.05em] uppercase text-gray-500

spacing_and_layout.app_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#F7F7F5] relative shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden pb-20

bottom_navigation.container: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-white border-t border-gray-200 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
bottom_navigation.item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors
bottom_navigation.fab: absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-14 h-14 bg-orange-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg border-4 border-[#F7F7F5] hover:bg-orange-700 transition-transform active:scale-95

timeline.stem: absolute left-[11px] top-4 bottom-4 w-[2px] bg-gray-200
timeline.node_past: absolute -left-6 top-1 w-3 h-3 bg-gray-900 rounded-none border-2 border-white outline outline-1 outline-gray-900
timeline.node_active: absolute -left-6 top-1 w-3 h-3 bg-orange-600 rounded-none border-2 border-white outline outline-1 outline-orange-600 animate-pulse
timeline.node_future: absolute -left-6 top-1 w-3 h-3 bg-white rounded-none border border-gray-300

buttons.primary: w-full bg-gray-900 text-white font-bold h-12 rounded-sm flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-orange-600
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-300 font-bold h-12 rounded-sm flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors

inputs.default: w-full h-12 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-sm px-4 text-base focus:border-gray-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gray-900 transition-colors outline-none
inputs.label: block font-mono text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1.5 uppercase

stage_chip.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-bold border rounded-none uppercase tracking-wide
stage_chip.usage: Dynamically apply colors from status_stages based on the product's current stage.

login_background.description: Industrial abstract texture used for the login screen background overlay (reduced opacity).

product_placeholder.description: Enamelware mug photo to be used as a thumbnail for products in the list view.

user_avatar.description: Portrait of a factory supervisor for the profile screen avatar.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All list items MUST slightly darken the border (`hover:border-gray-400`) and use a subtle `-translate-y-[1px]` transform.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Buttons and list items MUST scale down (`active:scale-[0.98]`) on tap to simulate physical button presses.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion. Pages should slide in slightly from the right and fade in (`initial={{opacity:0, x:10}} animate={{opacity:1, x:0}}`).

iconography.style: Use uniform 24px size for bottom nav, 16px for inline data. Stroke width 2px for solid, industrial feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text strictly passes WCAG AA. Backgrounds are off-white to reduce eye strain under factory fluorescent lights.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Every interactive element (buttons, tabs, inputs, stage chips, timeline items) MUST have a `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="btn-login"`, `data-testid="tab-dashboard"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the layout to mimic a mobile app: use `max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen` wrapped in a gray outer background so it looks like a phone screen on desktop.
2. Implement bottom navigation using the `bottom_navigation` styles. The 'Create Product' button should be a floating action button (FAB) overlapping the tab bar.
3. Use `Manrope` for all headings and `JetBrains Mono` for batch numbers, product IDs, and timestamps. Use `Inter` for regular body text.

4. For the Timeline component in Product Details, do NOT use default Shadcn stepper. Implement the custom strict vertical line with square nodes defined in `timeline` section. It should look like an industrial routing slip.
5. Stage Chips must use the exact colors provided in `status_stages`. No generic colors. Ensure borders are square `rounded-none`.
6. Build the Dashboard with a top stats bento grid (e.g., Total Active, Needs QC) using the `grid_bento` layout, followed by the searchable list of products.
7. Incorporate a mock API or FastAPI backend to handle the JWT login and product stage progression.
8. Use the `media_assets` URLs for the login background (with an overlay), product thumbnails, and profile avatar.
